creative_premise: Afterimage is a self-contained audiovisual field that reacts to touch, motion, and silence without explanation, account state, product framing, or project-navigation chrome.
completed_slice: Added a least-privilege GitHub Pages workflow that verifies the existing deployment contract, constructs an isolated two-file artifact, publishes only the Afterimage entrypoint and manifest, and records the returned deployment identity as a workflow artifact.

verification.interpretation: Source implementation is durable; hosting remains unverified until GitHub Actions produces a run and Pages returns a URL.

limits: The connector returned no workflow run associated with the source commit at inspection time.
GitHub Pages may require repository-level Pages configuration before the deployment job can succeed.
No physical or emulated narrow-mobile screenshot was captured in this slice.
The workflow records deployment identity but does not yet generate the full afterimage-deployment-receipt/1 digest packet.
rollback: No site source or prior deployment-contract artifact needs to be removed.
